caption: A woman with dark hair wearing a striped purple and white button-down shirt and a black over-the-ear headset is captured in a close-up shot against a plain white wall and light-colored curtains. She is positioned in the center of the frame, looking slightly off-camera. Across the sequence, she is speaking, with her mouth opening and closing as she communicates. Her facial expression remains neutral to serious, with slight shifts in her gaze and lip movements. In the bottom left corner of each frame, the text "Penny Devan" is partially visible. The background remains static, consisting of soft, vertical folds of cream-colored curtains on the left and a neutral-toned wall on the right. The lighting is consistent and soft, focusing on the woman's face and shoulders throughout the short clip.
